name: io.github.codespar/mcp-x402
description: HTTP-native micropayments, paywalls, USDC on Base/Solana — x402 protocol (Coinbase)

tools.name: pay_request
tools.description: Pay for a 402-protected resource and return its content

tools.name: verify_payment
tools.description: Verify if a x402 payment was received and settled

tools.name: create_paywall
tools.description: Create a x402 paywall for an endpoint

tools.name: get_paywall
tools.description: Get paywall configuration for a URL

tools.name: delete_paywall
tools.description: Remove a paywall from an endpoint
